title: Typography
description: A self-styled text component that renders semantic HTML elements (e.g., h1–h6, p, span, ul, li) with consistent typography, supporting both el and variant props for maximum flexibility.
summary: A semantic text component with built-in styling, customizable via element (el) or style variant.

body.raw:
## Usage

Basic usage example to quickly see how the `Typography` works.

<TypographyDemosUsage />

## Properties

Interactive configurator to explore customization options for the `Typography` component.

<TypographyDemosConfigurator />

## API References

### Styles API

| Styles API  | Type      | Default | Annotation                                    |
| ----------- | --------- | ------- | --------------------------------------------- |
| unstyled`?` | `boolean` | `false` | if `true`, all default styles will be removed |

### Props API

| Props API | Type                          | Default         | Annotation                                                                                                    |
| --------- | ----------------------------- | --------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| el`?`     | `React.ElementType`           | `div` \|`prose` | Determines the type of tag to be used.                                                                        |
| prose`?`  | `TypographyProps<T>["prose"]` | `undefined`     | Type of `prose` that matches the html tag will be created as a `<Typography>` element before `el` is defined. |

---

## Source Codes

Full working code example, including necessary markup and styles.
You can copy and paste this code directly to start using the component immediately.

<SourceCodes name="typography" />

\r

      h2: "scroll-m-20 text-[clamp(1.25rem,0.75rem+4vw,2.25rem)] leading-9 font-bold tracking-tight pb-2 first:mt-0",\r
      h3: "scroll-m-20 text-[clamp(1.125rem,11px+3.5vw,1.875rem)] leading-9 font-bold tracking-normal",\r
      h4: "scroll-m-20 text-[clamp(1.1875rem,0.75rem+3vw,1.5rem)] leading-7 font-semibold tracking-tight",\r
      h5: "scroll-m-20 text-[clamp(1rem,0.75rem+2vw,1.25rem)] leading-6 font-medium tracking-tight",\r
      h6: "scroll-m-20 text-[clamp(0.9375rem,0.75rem+2vw,1.125rem)] leading-4 font-medium tracking-tight",\r
      label: "mr-auto w-full text-sm text-muted-foreground [&:not(:first-child)]:mt-4 rtl:ml-auto rtl:mr-0",\r
      p: "leading-7 [&:not(:first-child)]:mt-2",\r
      span: "mt-1 w-full text-start text-sm text-muted-foreground first-of-type:mt-8",\r
      large: "text-lg font-semibold",\r
      small: "text-sm font-medium leading-none",\r
      ol: "my-5 ml-5 pl-5 list-decimal marker:font-normal [&:has(+ul)]:mb-0 [&:has(+ul)+ul]:my-0 [&:has(+ul)+ul]:ml-10 [&>li]:mt-2",\r
      ul: "my-5 ml-5 pl-5 list-disc marker:font-normal [&>li]:mt-2 [&_ol]:has-[ol]:ml-0 [&_ol]:has-[ol]:my-0 [&_ol]:has-[ol]:whitespace-normal [&_ul]:has-[ul]:ml-0 [&_ul]:has-[ul]:my-0 [&_ul]:has-[ul]:whitespace-normal",\r
      li: "list-item [text-align:-webkit-match-parent] [unicode-bidi:isolate] leading-normal",\r
      code: "relative rounded bg-muted/60 border border-solid border-border px-[0.3rem] py-[0.2rem] font-mono text-sm font-medium",\r
      kbd: "text-[calc(.85em*1)] rounded py-[calc(.15em*1)] px-[calc(.35em*1)] text-color [--shadow:hsl(var(--border))] [box-shadow:0_0_0_.0625em_var(--shadow),0_.09375em_0_.0625em_var(--shadow)]",\r
      em: "italic",\r
      hr: "my-3 h-0 w-full border-t border-solid border-border",\r
      lead: "text-xl text-muted-foreground",\r
      muted: "text-sm text-muted-foreground",\r
      blockquote: "my-5 whitespace-pre-line border-l-4 pl-6 italic rtl:border-l-0 rtl:border-r-4 rtl:pl-0 rtl:pr-6"\r
    }\r
  }\r
});\r
\r
export type TypographyProps<T extends React.ElementType = "div"> = React.PropsWithoutRef<React.ComponentProps<T>> & {\r
  el?: T | React.ElementType;\r
  unstyled?: boolean;\r
  children?: React.ReactNode;\r
  className?: string;\r
  style?: React.CSSProperties & Record<string, any>;\r
  ref?: React.ComponentPropsWithRef<T>["ref"];\r
} & cvxVariants<typeof typographyVariant>;\r
\r
type TypographyElement = <T extends React.ElementType = "div">(_props: TypographyProps<T>) => React.ReactElement;\r
\r
export const Typography = React.forwardRef(function Typography<T extends React.ElementType>(_props: Omit<TypographyProps<T>, "ref">, ref: React.ComponentPropsWithRef<T>["ref"]) {\r
  const { el, unstyled, className, prose, ...props } = _props;\r
  const proseElm = ["large", "lead", "muted"].includes(prose as string) ? "div" : prose;\r
  const Component = (el || proseElm || "div") as React.ElementType;\r
  return <Component {...{ ref, className: cn(!unstyled && typographyVariant({ prose }), className), ...props }} />;\r
